sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55081" key="katarubdh/sas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταρυβδήσας</orth>, <sense id="n55081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταρροιβδέω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάρῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατάρρυτος</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
